title: Welcome to the Biker Church App!
body: This is your wall. Announcements will show up here, check the calendar tab for upcoming events.

title: Are you in this picture?
body: If not, we hope you'll be in the next one.

title: Mini Chopper Auction Closed
body:
Winning bid for the mini-chopper is $650
Thank you Dave & Nancy Howard.

title: Are you in this picture?
body: If not, we hope you'll be in the next one.

title: Mini-Chopper delivered to its new home!
body: The mini-chopper was delivered this morning to David Howard and Nancy Howard in South Dayton. This was made possible by their generous donation + the hard work of Nicholas E P Gleason, Wayne Nero and Peyson Mohr. On a country back road, Peyson Mohr was able to max it out in 4th gear.....70 mph!!
